records.ety: [OE. merveillous, OF. merveillos, F. Merveilleux. See Marvel, n.]
usage: -- Marvelous, Wonderful. We speak of a thing as wonderful when it awakens our surprise and admiration; as marvelous when it is so much out of the ordinary course of things as to seem nearly or quite incredible.

defs: Exciting wonder or surprise; astonishing; wonderful.
quotes: This is the Lord's doing; it is marvelous in our eyes.

defs: Partaking of the character of miracle, or supernatural power; incredible; so improbable as to defy belief.
quotes: The marvelous fable includes whatever is supernatural, and especially the machines of the gods.
